_MAX_AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION_BYTES = 25 * 1024 * 1024  # 25MB


def _canonicalize_faiss_path(path_value: str) -> str:
    """Keep production-style FAISS paths stable across Windows localhost runs."""
    if not isinstance(path_value, str):
        return ""
    raw = path_value.strip().strip('"')
    if not raw:
        return ""

    slash_normalized = raw.replace("\\", "/")
    if slash_normalized.startswith("/"):
        return str(PurePosixPath(slash_normalized))

    return os.path.normpath(raw)


def _get_title_model_name() -> str:
    value, _ = resolve_model_value("title_model")
    return value or "gpt-4o-mini"


_TOOL_DISPLAY_NAME_MAP = {
    "add_guideline_to_context": "Guideline Context",
    "mortgage_calculator": "Loan Calculator",
    "dti_calculator": "DTI Calculator",
    "cow_calculator": "Cost of Waiting Calculator",
    "income_avg_calculator": "Income Averaging Calculator",
    "cash_calculator": "Cash to Close Calculator",
}


def _humanize_tool_name(function_name: str) -> str:
    if not isinstance(function_name, str) or not function_name.strip():
        return "Tool"
    mapped = _TOOL_DISPLAY_NAME_MAP.get(function_name.strip())
    if mapped:
        return mapped
    words = [w for w in function_name.strip().split("_") if w]
    if not words:
        return "Tool"
    return " ".join(word.capitalize() for word in words)


def _build_tool_activity_text(function_name: str, function_args: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
    if function_name == "add_guideline_to_context":
        guideline = function_args.get("guideline")
        if isinstance(guideline, str) and guideline.strip():
            return f"Added {guideline.strip()} to the chat."
        return "Updated guideline context for this chat."
